emails.subject: Re: FW: SoCalGas Capacity Forum
emails.body: Re: FW: SoCalGas Capacity Forum Thanks. My guess is that someone ought to go and represent TW. Fawcett and Harris ought to make that call. Jeff D: I assume you know who Lad Lorenz is. Either Jeff: does Lad's involvement signal anything to us--i.e., is he their "get stuff done guy" or their "try to look like you are getting stuff done guy" DF From: Jeff Dasovich on 02/27/2001 07:51 PM Sent by: Jeff Dasovich
